name: spectr-native-editor
description: Spectr's editor implemented natively via @pulp/react — pulp #772 / spectr #25

scripts.build: esbuild editor.tsx --bundle --format=iife --platform=neutral --target=es2020 --jsx-factory=createElement --jsx-fragment=Fragment --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --outfile=dist/editor.body.js && cat shim.js dist/editor.body.js > dist/editor.js && rm dist/editor.body.js
scripts.build:port: esbuild editor-port.tsx --bundle --format=iife --platform=neutral --target=es2020 --loader:.js=jsx --jsx-factory=createElement --jsx-fragment=Fragment --alias:react/jsx-runtime=./jsx-runtime-shim.ts --alias:react/jsx-dev-runtime=./jsx-runtime-shim.ts --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --outfile=dist/editor.body.js && cat shim.js dist/editor.body.js > dist/editor.js && rm dist/editor.body.js
scripts.build:port:dev: esbuild editor-port.tsx --bundle --format=iife --platform=neutral --target=es2020 --loader:.js=jsx --jsx-factory=createElement --jsx-fragment=Fragment --alias:react/jsx-runtime=./jsx-runtime-shim.ts --alias:react/jsx-dev-runtime=./jsx-runtime-shim.ts --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"development"' --outfile=dist/editor.body.js && cat shim.js dist/editor.body.js > dist/editor.js && rm dist/editor.body.js
